name: Prof. Sarah Chen
title: Professor of Psychiatry
address: Mental Health Services, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Prof. Sarah Chen leads the Treatment-Resistant Depression Clinic at Prince of Wales Hospital. She specialises in neurostimulation therapies including TMS and ketamine-assisted treatment, combining world-class research with compassionate clinical care for patients across South Eastern Sydney.

name: Dr. James Morrison
title: Consultant Psychiatrist
address: Mental Health Services, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Clinical lead for youth mental health services at Prince of Wales Hospital, with expertise in psychopharmacology and integrated care for adolescents and young adults.

name: Dr. Alex Rivera
title: Consultant Psychiatrist
address: Mental Health Services, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Consultant psychiatrist specialising in treatment-resistant depression and participation in precinct clinical trials for mood disorders.

name: A/Prof Craig Haifer
title: Associate Professor
address: Level 2, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Head of Gastroenterology and Hepatology at Prince of Wales Hospital. Provides consultative and diagnostic services including endoscopy, colonoscopy, and advanced liver disease management.

name: Dr Santosh Sanagapalli
title: Staff Specialist
address: Level 2, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Staff specialist in interventional endoscopy, performing ERCP, endoscopic ultrasound, and complex therapeutic procedures.

name: A/Prof Cameron Holloway
title: Associate Professor
address: Cardiology Outpatients, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Clinical Director of Cardiology with expertise in heart failure management and cardiac imaging across the Randwick campus.

name: A/Prof Dennis Kuchar
title: Associate Professor
address: Cardiology Outpatients, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Specialist in cardiac electrophysiology, managing arrhythmias and performing catheter ablation procedures.

name: Prof. Elena Vasquez
title: Professor of Paediatrics
address: Sydney Children's Hospital, High Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Professor of Paediatrics leading the precinct's rare diseases and clinical genetics programme, providing multidisciplinary care for children with complex genetic conditions.

name: A/Prof Anthony Joshua
title: Associate Professor
address: Oncology Day Unit, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Medical oncologist specialising in solid tumour management and access to precinct clinical trials for cancer patients.

name: A/Prof Nada Hamad
title: Associate Professor
address: Oncology Day Unit, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Haematologist and medical oncologist providing care for blood cancers and coordinating multidisciplinary cancer treatment.

name: Dr Michael Torres
title: Director of Emergency Medicine
address: Emergency Department, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Director of the adult Emergency Department at Prince of Wales Hospital, providing tertiary-level trauma and emergency medical care.

name: Dr Lisa Nguyen
title: Director of Paediatric Emergency
address: Children's Emergency Department, High Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Director of Paediatric Emergency at Sydney Children's Hospital Randwick, one of Australia's busiest children's emergency departments.

name: A/Prof Adrian Havryk
title: Associate Professor
address: Thoracic Medicine, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Specialist in respiratory and sleep medicine with expertise in lung transplantation and advanced pulmonary disease management.

name: Dr Mei Lin
title: Consultant Nephrologist
address: Renal Unit, Prince of Wales Hospital, Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
bio: Consultant nephrologist managing chronic kidney disease, dialysis, and pre-transplant assessment for patients across SESLHD.
